ETPercentileContext:
/* COMP-CTX-any */ /*INSERT INTO ETPercentileContext*/
SELECT EVAL( 'percentile(RawExecutionTime,0.95)', 'RawExecutionTime2', RawETContext ) AS metricValue, 
       3 AS level,
       current_timestamp AS timestamp
FROM RawETContext.std:lastevent() AS RawETContext
SimulationOnTime:
/* SLO-any */ /*INSERT INTO SimulationOnTime*/
SELECT * FROM FinishTimeMarginCondition
FinishTimeMarginCondition:
/* CONSTR-MET-GLOBAL */ /*INSERT INTO FinishTimeMarginCondition*/ 
SELECT * FROM FinishTimeMarginContext HAVING FinishTimeMarginContext.metricValue <= 0.0
CoresSLO:
/* SLO-any */ /*INSERT INTO CoresSLO*/
SELECT * FROM CoreSLOCondition
FinishTimeMarginContext:
/* COMP-CTX-any */ /*INSERT INTO FinishTimeMarginContext*/
SELECT EVAL( 'ETPercentile * (SimulationLeftNumber / totalCoreNumber) - RawRemainingSimulationTime', 'ETPercentile,SimulationLeftNumber', ETPercentileContext, SimulationLeftContext ) AS metricValue, 
       3 AS level,
       current_timestamp AS timestamp
FROM ETPercentileContext.std:lastevent() AS ETPercentileContext, SimulationLeftContext.std:lastevent() AS SimulationLeftContext

SimulationLeftContext:
/* RAW-CTX-PER_INSTANCE */ /*INSERT INTO SimulationLeftContext*/
SELECT * FROM SimulationLeftSensor
RawETContext:
/* RAW-CTX-PER_INSTANCE */ /*INSERT INTO RawETContext*/
SELECT * FROM ETSensor
